COMMON.TOOLTIP_REAL_TIME_POSITIONS: You can notify the admin of position change if you think it's wrong.

SETTINGS.TITLE: Settings
SETTINGS.MODAL_INIT_SETTINGS: Do you want to reset all settings?

MODAL.POSITION_NOTIFY_CHANGE_DESC:
Notify the operator that [%s]'s position has changed as follows.
If it has become no-position, please leave it all blank and submit.
MODAL.SIGN_IN_DESC:
By setting a nickname while signed in, you can have a unique fixed nickname.
Also, your profile image and nickname will be preserved even if your device changes or browser cache is deleted.
MODAL.LOGOUT_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to log out?

TOAST.REAL_TIME_TICKER_SELECTED: {symbol} is set as real time ticker for browser title.
TOAST.POSITION_EDIT_REQUESTED: You notified the admin that the BJ has changed position

APP_CHAT.TOOLTIP_CHAT_DING: Plays a sound when a new message arrives.
APP_CHAT.TOOLTIP_CHAT_OVERLAY_NEW_MESSAGE: Shows a summary of new messages when the chat is closed or hidden.
APP_CHAT.TOOLTIP_CHAT_SIZE_MAX: Expands the chat window to fill the screen.
APP_CHAT.TOOLTIP_FIXED_NICKNAME: This account has a unique fixed nickname.
APP_CHAT.MODAL_CONFIRM_DELETE_IMAGE: Are you sure you want to delete your profile image?
